allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\User\\Downloads\\BACheckin System - Operation Deck.pdf"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $text | Select-String -Pattern "\(?<=BT\\s\)\(.+?\)\(?=\\sET\)" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 50 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value })
